translations.description: AlMnabr Consulting Professional Co. is a Saudi consultancy firm built on integrity, excellence, and client trust.

translations.title: Our Services
translations.subtitle: We provide comprehensive consulting services to help your business grow and succeed
translations.architectural_design_desc: Creative and innovative architectural design for residential and commercial buildings
translations.fire_life_safety_desc: Design of safety and fire fighting systems according to international standards
translations.factory_warehouses_design_desc: High-efficiency design and planning of industrial facilities and warehouses
translations.building_permits_services_desc: Obtaining necessary licenses and approvals for construction and real estate development projects
translations.contract_disputes_resolution_desc: Specialized legal services in construction contracts and engineering dispute resolution
translations.pmo_pmc_services_desc: Comprehensive project management with specialized engineering consulting
translations.projects_supervision_services_desc: Specialized engineering supervision to ensure project execution according to required specifications
translations.infrastructure_services_desc: Design and development of utility networks and infrastructure for large projects
translations.related_projects_desc: Explore projects where we've applied this service
translations.structural_engineering_desc: Safe and stable structural design for all types of buildings
translations.mechanical_engineering_desc: HVAC systems and mechanical equipment design
translations.electrical_engineering_desc: Power distribution and electrical system design
translations.plumbing_engineering_desc: Water supply and drainage system design
translations.fire_safety_engineering_desc: Fire detection and suppression system design
translations.consulting_services_desc: Expert technical advice and strategic planning
translations.architectural_design_details: Our architectural design services encompass comprehensive planning and design solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects. We combine creativity with functionality to deliver innovative designs that meet client requirements while adhering to local building codes and regulations.
translations.structural_engineering_details: Our structural engineering expertise ensures the safety and stability of all construction projects. We provide detailed structural analysis, design calculations, and construction drawings for various building types, from residential homes to large-scale commercial complexes.
translations.mechanical_engineering_details: We offer complete mechanical engineering solutions including HVAC systems, plumbing design, and mechanical equipment specifications. Our team ensures optimal energy efficiency and comfort while maintaining cost-effectiveness and sustainability.
translations.electrical_engineering_details: Our electrical engineering services cover power distribution, lighting design, and electrical system planning. We design safe, efficient, and code-compliant electrical systems for all types of buildings and infrastructure projects.
translations.plumbing_engineering_details: We provide comprehensive plumbing engineering services including water supply systems, drainage design, and fire protection systems. Our designs ensure efficient water management and compliance with health and safety standards.
translations.fire_safety_engineering_details: Our fire safety engineering services focus on life safety and property protection. We design fire detection, suppression, and evacuation systems that meet international fire safety standards and local building codes.
translations.project_management_details: Our project management services ensure successful project delivery from conception to completion. We coordinate all aspects of the project, manage timelines and budgets, and maintain quality standards throughout the construction process.
translations.consulting_services_details: We provide expert consulting services across all engineering disciplines. Our experienced consultants offer technical advice, feasibility studies, and strategic planning to help clients make informed decisions about their projects.

translations.title: NEWS
translations.subtitle: Stay updated with our latest projects, achievements, and industry insights.
translations.news1_desc: We are proud to announce the successful completion of the Al-Hoota Sedair Mosque project, showcasing our expertise in architectural design and project management.
translations.news2_desc: Our team is working on the prestigious Gloria Five-Star Hotel project, demonstrating our commitment to excellence in hospitality infrastructure.
translations.news3_desc: Reaching a significant milestone in the Dammam North Housing Project, reflecting our dedication to sustainable urban development.
translations.news4_desc: AlMnabr Consulting is expanding its operations with a new state-of-the-art office in Riyadh to better serve our growing client base across the region.
translations.news5_desc: We are honored to receive the prestigious Industry Recognition Award for our outstanding contributions to sustainable development and architectural excellence.
translations.news6_desc: AlMnabr Consulting announces strategic partnership with leading international consultants to enhance our service offerings and global reach.
translations.news1_content: We are proud to announce the successful completion of the Al-Hoota Sedair Mosque project, showcasing our expertise in architectural design and project management. This landmark project represents our commitment to excellence and our ability to deliver complex architectural solutions that meet the highest standards of quality and functionality.
translations.news2_content: Our team is working on the prestigious Gloria Five-Star Hotel project, demonstrating our commitment to excellence in hospitality infrastructure. This project showcases our comprehensive approach to luxury hotel development, combining innovative design with practical functionality to create an exceptional guest experience.
translations.news3_content: Reaching a significant milestone in the Dammam North Housing Project, reflecting our dedication to sustainable urban development. This project represents our commitment to creating sustainable, livable communities that meet the needs of modern families while preserving environmental integrity.
translations.news4_content: AlMnabr Consulting is expanding its operations with a new state-of-the-art office in Riyadh to better serve our growing client base across the region. This expansion represents our commitment to growth and our dedication to providing enhanced services to our valued clients.
translations.news5_content: We are honored to receive the prestigious Industry Recognition Award for our outstanding contributions to sustainable development and architectural excellence. This recognition validates our commitment to innovation and excellence in the consulting industry.
translations.news6_content: AlMnabr Consulting announces strategic partnership with leading international consultants to enhance our service offerings and global reach. This partnership will enable us to provide even more comprehensive and innovative solutions to our clients worldwide.

translations.title: Latest News & Updates
translations.subtitle: Stay informed about our latest projects, company achievements, and industry insights that shape the future of consulting services.

translations.project1_mission: Studies, Design, Approvals, Executive Plans, and LEED certification

translations.project3_mission: Urban planning, architectural design, and infrastructure development
translations.project3_components: Residential complex with multiple housing units, community facilities, and green spaces.
translations.project4_mission: Industrial facility design, structural engineering, and construction supervision
translations.project4_components: Modern manufacturing facility with production lines, storage areas, and administrative offices.
translations.project5_mission: Mechanical engineering, elevator systems design, and installation supervision
translations.project5_components: Advanced elevator manufacturing facility with testing laboratories and training centers.
translations.project6_mission: Food processing facility design, quality control systems, and production optimization
translations.project6_components: Coffee processing and packaging facility with roasting units, quality control labs, and packaging lines.

translations.application_redirect_message: You will be redirected to our application system. Please prepare your resume and cover letter.
translations.principal_mechanical_engineer_descriptio: We are seeking a Principal Mechanical Engineer to lead our mechanical engineering team and oversee the design and implementation of complex mechanical systems for large-scale construction projects. This role requires strong technical expertise, leadership skills, and experience in HVAC, plumbing, and fire protection systems.
translations.principal_mechanical_engineer_requiremen:
• Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering
• 8-12 years of experience in mechanical engineering
• Professional Engineer (PE) license preferred
• Experience with AutoCAD, Revit, and other design software
• Strong knowledge of building codes and standards
• Excellent communication and leadership skills
• Experience in project management and team leadership
translations.principal_mechanical_engineer_responsibi:
• Lead mechanical engineering design for complex projects
• Oversee HVAC, plumbing, and fire protection system design
• Manage and mentor junior engineers
• Coordinate with architects, structural engineers, and contractors
• Review and approve mechanical engineering drawings
• Ensure compliance with building codes and standards
• Participate in project meetings and client presentations
translations.principal_mechanical_engineer_benefits:
• Competitive salary and benefits package
• Professional development opportunities
• Health insurance and retirement plans
• Flexible work arrangements
• Collaborative and innovative work environment
translations.senior_project_manager_description: We are looking for a Senior Project Manager to lead and manage complex construction and consulting projects from inception to completion. This role requires strong project management skills, client relationship management, and experience in the construction industry.
translations.senior_project_manager_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business, or related field
• 10-15 years of project management experience
• PMP certification preferred
• Experience in construction or consulting industry
• Strong leadership and communication skills
• Proficiency in project management software
• Experience with budget management and risk assessment
translations.senior_project_manager_responsibilities:
• Lead and manage multiple projects simultaneously
• Develop project plans, schedules, and budgets
• Coordinate with clients, contractors, and stakeholders
• Monitor project progress and ensure quality standards
• Manage project risks and resolve issues
• Prepare project reports and presentations
• Mentor junior project managers
translations.senior_project_manager_benefits:
• Competitive salary and performance bonuses
• Comprehensive health and dental insurance
• Professional development and training
• Flexible work schedule
• Travel opportunities for project sites
translations.principal_architect_description: We are seeking a Principal Architect to lead our architectural design team and create innovative, sustainable, and functional designs for various project types. This role requires creative vision, technical expertise, and experience in leading architectural teams.
translations.principal_architect_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Architecture
• 12-18 years of architectural experience
• Licensed Architect preferred
• Experience with AutoCAD, Revit, and 3D modeling software
• Strong portfolio of completed projects
• Knowledge of sustainable design principles
• Excellent design and communication skills
translations.principal_architect_responsibilities:
• Lead architectural design for complex projects
• Develop innovative design concepts and solutions
• Manage and mentor architectural team
• Coordinate with engineers and consultants
• Present designs to clients and stakeholders
• Ensure design quality and compliance
• Participate in business development activities
translations.principal_architect_benefits:
• Competitive salary and benefits
• Creative and collaborative work environment
• Professional development opportunities
• Health and wellness benefits
• Flexible work arrangements
translations.fire_safety_consultant_description: We are looking for a Fire Safety Consultant to provide expert advice on fire safety systems, codes, and regulations for various building types. This role requires specialized knowledge in fire safety engineering and regulatory compliance.
translations.fire_safety_consultant_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Fire Safety Engineering or related field
• 5-8 years of fire safety consulting experience
• Knowledge of fire safety codes and standards
• Experience with fire safety system design
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
• Excellent communication and presentation skills
translations.fire_safety_consultant_responsibilities:
• Conduct fire safety assessments and audits
• Design fire safety systems and evacuation plans
• Review building designs for fire safety compliance
• Prepare fire safety reports and documentation
• Provide expert testimony and consultation
• Stay updated on fire safety regulations and standards
translations.fire_safety_consultant_benefits:
• Competitive contract rate
• Flexible work schedule
• Professional development opportunities
• Travel opportunities for site visits
• Collaborative work environment
translations.infrastructure_engineer_description: We are seeking an Infrastructure Engineer to design and oversee civil infrastructure projects including roads, utilities, and site development. This role requires expertise in civil engineering and infrastructure design.
translations.infrastructure_engineer_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering
• 6-10 years of infrastructure engineering experience
• Professional Engineer (PE) license preferred
• Experience with civil design software
• Knowledge of infrastructure codes and standards
• Strong technical and analytical skills
translations.infrastructure_engineer_responsibilities:
• Design civil infrastructure systems
• Prepare engineering drawings and specifications
• Conduct site investigations and surveys
• Coordinate with utility companies and agencies
• Review and approve infrastructure designs
• Ensure compliance with regulations and standards
translations.infrastructure_engineer_benefits:
• Competitive salary and benefits
• Professional development opportunities
• Health insurance and retirement plans
• Collaborative work environment
• Opportunities for career growth
translations.interior_design_specialist_description: We are looking for an Interior Design Specialist to create functional and aesthetically pleasing interior spaces for various project types. This role requires creative design skills and knowledge of interior design principles.
translations.interior_design_specialist_requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Interior Design
• 4-7 years of interior design experience
• Proficiency in design software (AutoCAD, SketchUp, etc.)
• Knowledge of materials, finishes, and furniture
• Strong creative and technical skills
• Excellent communication and presentation abilities
translations.interior_design_specialist_responsibilit:
• Create interior design concepts and layouts
• Select materials, finishes, and furniture
• Prepare design drawings and specifications
• Coordinate with architects and contractors
• Present designs to clients
• Ensure design quality and functionality
translations.interior_design_specialist_benefits:
• Competitive part-time rate
• Flexible work schedule
• Creative work environment
• Professional development opportunities
• Collaborative team atmosphere

translations.hero_subtitle: Building the Future Through Excellence and Innovation
translations.who_we_are_content: AlMnabr Consulting Professional Co. is a leading Saudi consultancy firm established on the foundations of integrity, excellence, and client trust. With years of experience in the consulting industry, we have built a reputation for delivering innovative solutions and exceptional results across various sectors including architectural design, fire and life safety, industrial facilities, and infrastructure development. Our team of highly skilled professionals is committed to providing comprehensive consulting services that help our clients achieve their goals and drive sustainable growth.
translations.value1_desc: It is the primary motivation for commitment to agreements and implement professional standards that ensure stakeholders' benefits
translations.value2_desc: AlMnabr prioritizes it for its clients and all their projects fostering an innovative spirit and opportunities for success. It ensures that no information that could potentially harm its clients' future is disclosed.
translations.value3_desc: It is the concept we seek to integrate into all our projects.
translations.value4_desc: AlMnabr greatly values the participation of all its team members and fosters effective communication to understand its clients' visions and project needs.
translations.value5_desc: AlMnabr always pays meticulous attention to every detail of its activities to ensure the achievement of its clients' goals with appropriate standards.
translations.value6_desc: It’s a method through which AlMnabr builds trust that helps completing tasks.
translations.award1_desc: Recognized for outstanding contributions to sustainable development and architectural excellence.
translations.award2_desc: Awarded for exceptional service delivery and client satisfaction in the consulting industry.
translations.award3_desc: Honored for innovative approaches in architectural and engineering design solutions.
translations.download_portfolio_desc: Explore our comprehensive portfolio showcasing our expertise, completed projects, and success stories. Download our detailed portfolio to learn more about our capabilities and achievements.

translations.privacy_policy_section1_content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you contact us, request a quote, or subscribe to our newsletter. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and company information.
translations.privacy_policy_section2_content: We use the information we collect to:
translations.privacy_policy_section2_item2: Communicate with you about our services
translations.privacy_policy_section2_item3: Send you marketing materials (with your consent)
translations.privacy_policy_section3_content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as described in this policy or as required by law.
translations.privacy_policy_section4_content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
translations.privacy_policy_section5_content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time.
translations.privacy_policy_section6_content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our website. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
translations.privacy_policy_section7_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@almanabr.com.
translations.terms_of_service_section1_content: By accessing and using our website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
translations.terms_of_service_section2_content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on AlMnabr Consulting's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
translations.terms_of_service_section2_item2: Use the materials for any commercial purpose
translations.terms_of_service_section2_item3: Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations
translations.terms_of_service_section2_item4: Transfer the materials to another person
translations.terms_of_service_section3_content: The materials on AlMnabr Consulting's website are provided on an 'as is' basis. AlMnabr Consulting makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
translations.terms_of_service_section4_content: In no event shall AlMnabr Consulting or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on AlMnabr Consulting's website.
translations.terms_of_service_section5_content: The materials appearing on AlMnabr Consulting's website could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. AlMnabr Consulting does not warrant that any of the materials on its website are accurate, complete or current.
translations.terms_of_service_section6_content: AlMnabr Consulting has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its website and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by AlMnabr Consulting of the site.
translations.terms_of_service_section7_content: AlMnabr Consulting may revise these terms of service for its website at any time without notice. By using this website you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these Terms of Service.
translations.cookies_settings_section1_content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience and understand how you use our site.
translations.cookies_settings_section2_content: We use the following types of cookies:
translations.cookies_settings_section2_item1: Essential cookies: Required for the website to function properly
translations.cookies_settings_section2_item2: Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors use our website
translations.cookies_settings_section2_item3: Marketing cookies: Used to deliver relevant advertisements
translations.cookies_settings_section3_content: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies, though this may affect your experience on our website.
translations.cookies_settings_section4_content: Some cookies on our website are set by third-party services, such as Google Analytics. These services have their own privacy policies and cookie practices.
translations.cookies_settings_section5_content: We may update this Cookies Settings page from time to time. Please check back regularly to stay informed about our cookie practices.
